title: How technology is shaping Hajj
full_text:
How technology is shaping Hajj
How technology is shaping Hajj
With nearly two million worshippers performing Hajj this year, technology has become key to making sure everything runs smoothly. Al Jazeera’s Ahmed Idris explains technology’s role in one of the world’s largest and most logistically complex religious gatherings.
Published On 25 May 2026
